items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi stated Albemarle will become a key beneficiary of structural expansion in lithium demand based on its asset portfolio, global lithium refining network, and capacity to invest in growth projects. Global ESS battery production forecast at 950 GWh in 2026 (+35% YoY), expanding

items.headline: Does Albemarle Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand CAGR of 10-20% from 2025-2030. ESS production +117% YoY in Q1 2026. Higher lithium prices driven by strong EV/ESS demand and supply disruptions from China production cuts. Q1 operating cash flow $346M, free cash flow $248M.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
items.snippet: Q1 net sales +70% YoY. Adj. EBITDA nearly tripled. Global lithium consumption up 37%, energy storage demand up 117% YoY. Full-year cost disruptions $70M-$90M from Middle East. On track for $100-150M cost improvements in 2026.
